title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Sanofi India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Sanofi India
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
